Localization.Description: A user performed an action with an LDAP/AD domain

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} removed LDAP/AD domain "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed LDAP/AD domain "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created LDAP/AD domain "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
